name: perf-audit
description: On-demand performance audit for a Next.js + PostHog app.

interface.shortDescription: On-demand performance audit for a Next.js + PostHog app. Gathers slow routes from bundle sizes, Web Vitals RUM, and backend events/errors, then fans
interface.longDescription: On-demand performance audit for a Next.js + PostHog app. Gathers slow routes from bundle sizes, Web Vitals RUM, and backend events/errors, then fans out parallel subagents — one per finding, each in its own worktree — that open PRs against the worst offenders. Repo-agnostic; reads `.claude/perf.json` from the current repo for thresholds and signal sources. Stops at "ready for review"; never auto-merges. Use when the user says "run a perf audit", "audit performance", "find slow routes", or invokes `/msilvis:perf-audit`.
